headline: O'Reilly Automotive Stock: Is ORLY Underperforming the Consumer Discretionary Sector?
summary: O'Reilly Automotive has underperformed the Consumer Discretionary sector over the past year, but analysts are highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: TD Cowen Reiterates Buy on AutoZone, Maintains $3700 Price Target
